raw_consumer_statement:
Had Citibank credit card for a few months and was only using it for gas and groceries. On Friday, XX/XX/XXXX I was checking my account and noticed a {$99.00} charge to XXXX XXXX XXXX, a store I never shop at. I immediately called Citibank and they canceled my card and said I would not be responsible for the charges. They sent me a replacement card and gave me a temporary conditional credit during the " investigation. '' Instead of submitting it as a fraud dispute they submitted it as a cancellation of goods or services. 
After almostXX/XX/XXXX months of countless phone calls and promises, they reversed the conditional credit and said I am responsible for the {$99.00}. They said it will affect my credit score if I don't pay.
